{{CargoClone
|name=Mutant Hairsnake
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=102
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Resolver: 4.5% chance +1 Cultivation Fluid
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=When in Zombie Form:
> Gain +1.5% Evo Chests in explorations
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=When in Zombie Form:
> Gain +2.5% Evo Chests in explorations
|}}
